steps.t: Thane Elfmar resides in the mead hall at the centre of Faldham. Elfmar awaits word regarding the resolution of Nothwulf's concerns.
Thane Elfmar resides in the mead hall at the centre of Faldham. Elfmar awaits word regarding the resolution of Osin's concerns.
Thane Elfmar resides in the mead hall at the centre of Faldham. Elfmar awaits word regarding the resolution of Lanfrith's concerns.
